name: Cheveux Restorative Mask
shortDesc: A weekly intensive treatment that reverses protein loss in damaged hair, leaving it with the weight, movement, and shine of its original state.
description:
Developed with a trichologist at the University of Zurich, the Cheveux Restorative Mask addresses hair damage at the cortical level—the fibrous protein structure that gives hair its strength, elasticity, and light-reflective quality.

The formula is anchored by a hydrolysed keratin complex of low molecular weight, capable of penetrating the cortex rather than merely coating the cuticle. To this, we add cold-pressed abyssinian oil—a rare oleic-eruic acid blend that imparts flexibility without weight—and a biofermented soy extract that reinforces the hair's hydrogen bond structure.

The result is not the false, waxy shine of silicone-heavy treatments. It is the genuine lustre of hair that is structurally well.

ingredients.name: Low-MW Hydrolysed Keratin
ingredients.benefit: Small molecular fragments that penetrate the hair cortex to replace lost protein and restore tensile strength.

ingredients.name: Cold-Pressed Abyssinian Oil
ingredients.benefit: With the highest erucic acid content of any plant oil, abyssinian provides exceptional slip and flexibility without silicone heaviness.

ingredients.name: Biofermented Soy Protein
ingredients.benefit: 72-hour fermentation unlocks amino acids that selectively reinforce weakened areas of the hair shaft.

ingredients.name: Panthenol
ingredients.benefit: Provitamin B5 that humectifies from within the hair structure, increasing diameter and reducing breakage.

usage: After shampooing, gently press excess water from hair. Apply a generous amount from mid-length to ends, avoiding the scalp. Comb through with a wide-toothed comb to ensure even distribution. Leave for 10–20 minutes (longer for severely damaged hair). Rinse thoroughly with cool water to seal the cuticle. Use once weekly.
benefits: Measurable reduction in breakage after 3 uses
Silicone-free formula that does not create build-up
Suitable for colour-treated and chemically processed hair
Fragrance from certified-natural essential oils only
